contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Fix expense parser: order-independent GAS extractExpenseDetails + detailed diagnostics
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/377
  
  Details:
  ### Fixed the GAS expense parser to be robust and order-independent
  
  **Before:** Single rigid regex — any field order change (e.g. Submission Source before Attached Filename) broke the parser with 'Regex failed to match message' and no diagnostics.
  
  **After:** Each field extracted individually by label name. Supports legacy fallbacks (Item→Inventory Type, Cost→Inventory Quantity). Detailed logging shows exactly which fields are missing.
  
  **Also fixed:** GAS global-scope SyntaxError from duplicate const declarations; empty tdg_expenses_processing.js (was Code.js duplicate).
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/377 (merged)
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
